mapper.select: SELECT f.favorite_id AS favoriteId, f.user_id AS userId, f.product_id AS productId, p.product_name AS productName, p.product_image_url AS productImageUrl, p.price AS price, p.description AS description FROM favorites f INNER JOIN products p ON f.product_id = p.product_id WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} AND p.use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY f.favorite_id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO favorites ( user_id, product_id, created_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{productId}, NOW() )
